title: AssisMe
summary: A job board where candidates stand out with video resumes and employers post engaging video job listings.
description: AssisMe is a Job Board Application to connect Employer with Employee the need was to create an application where candidates looking for a job can record a "Video Resume" To show case their talent and employer who is hiring can also create a "Video job post".
challenge: Traditional CVs rarely capture communication skills and personality. Employers needed a faster way to shortlist while candidates wanted a fairer way to present themselves beyond bullet points.
solution: We designed a dual-sided experience: rich video capture with compression and streaming-friendly pipelines, employer dashboards for reviewing applicants, and a calm UI that keeps the focus on people—not forms.
results: Structured flows for record → preview → publish video profiles
Role-based dashboards for employers and candidates
Design system aligned for fast iteration in Figma

title: Hotlyme
summary: Social experience for sharing updates and staying close to friends and family—with a polished, modern feed.
description: Hotlyme is a Social Media Application to connect with your friends and family and share your thoughts and ideas with them.
challenge: Users expect social apps to feel instant and expressive, while the product team needed a maintainable stack that could grow with new media types and moderation tools.
solution: We shipped a composable feed architecture, real-time friendly data patterns, and a bold but readable visual language—tested for long scrolling sessions and accessibility basics.
results: Composable post types and media cards
Scalable theming for future brand shifts

title: Compassionate Alliance
summary: A React.js website for a community support initiative, built for clarity, trust, and fast performance.
description: Compassionate Alliance is a web platform that helps families quickly request funeral support, learn about membership, and access donation and support resources through a clean, accessible website experience.
performanceCaption: GTmetrix report snapshot highlighting strong Core Web Vitals and load performance.
challenge: Create a trustworthy, easy-to-navigate website that communicates services clearly and supports key actions (membership, support requests, donations) without friction—while staying fast on real devices.
solution: We developed a React.js frontend with a clean information architecture and strong visual hierarchy, deployed on Railway with a PostgreSQL database for reliable data storage and future scalability.
results: Fast-loading marketing and support flows (high Lighthouse/GTMetrix scores)
Responsive layout optimized for desktop and mobile
Deployment on Railway with PostgreSQL-backed data layer
